'''shajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoologically|zoologically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoologically|zoologically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shajate|shajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shajatesher|shajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatesherĂ«m|shajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shajatero|shajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajateshĂ«|shajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajateshĂ«m|shajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishajatero|gokishajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajateshĂ«|gokishajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajateshĂ«m|gokishajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshajankerom|goshajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajankeshĂ«|goshajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajankeshĂ«m|goshajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshajankeya|goshajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shajaterom|shajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatemu|shajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shajateya|shajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishajaterom|gokishajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatemu|gokishajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishajateya|gokishajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shajajate|shajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shajajatesher|shajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajatesherĂ«m|shajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shajajatero|shajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajajateshĂ«|shajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajateshĂ«m|shajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishajajatero|gokishajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajajateshĂ«|gokishajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajateshĂ«m|gokishajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshajajankerom|goshajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajajankeshĂ«|goshajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajankeshĂ«m|goshajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshajajankeya|goshajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shajajaterom|shajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajatemu|shajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shajajateya|shajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishajajaterom|gokishajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajatemu|gokishajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishajajateya|gokishajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠte|shĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠtesher|shĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠtero|shĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠjĂŠtero|gokishĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠjĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠjĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠterom|shĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠtemu|shĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠjĂŠteya|shĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠjĂŠterom|gokishĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠjĂŠteya|gokishĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafjafte|shafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafjaftesher|shafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafjaftesherĂ«m|shafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafjaftero|shafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafjafteshĂ«|shafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafjafteshĂ«m|shafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafjaftero|gokishafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafjafteshĂ«|gokishafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafjafteshĂ«m|gokishafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafjafnkerom|goshafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafjafnkeshĂ«|goshafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafjafnkeshĂ«m|goshafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafjafnkeya|goshafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafjafterom|shafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafjaftemu|shafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafjafteya|shafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafjafterom|gokishafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafjaftemu|gokishafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafjafteya|gokishafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
